message:
feat(engine): implement TemplateLiteral IR3 instruction and real Construct semantics

ir_contract.rs: Add TemplateLiteral { parts: RegRange, dst: Reg } variant
to Ir3Instruction enum with canonical_value() serialization.

baseline_interpreter.rs: Full Construct implementation with ES2020
section 9.2.2 constructor semantics — this-allocation, constructor
return-value rule (non-object returns yield the allocated this). Adds
construct_this field to CallFrame. Full TemplateLiteral execution with
type coercion for all Value variants. Six new tests.

execution_orchestrator.rs: Add TemplateLiteral to instruction name map.

lowering_pipeline.rs: Template literal lowering now collects part registers
and emits Ir3Instruction::TemplateLiteral instead of Move placeholder.
Also includes rustfmt reformatting of binary operator and compound
assignment match arms.

lib.rs: Register three new modules (claim_publication_gate,
lowering_parity_evidence, zero_placeholder_scan). Add TemplateLiteral
to ir3_destination_register.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
